title: Tactical Arena
tagline: 30 units, campaign battles, online duels, every tile a gamble.
description: A browser-based isometric tactics game on a fantasy war-table — the successor to Mini-Tactics. Draft four-unit squads from a 30-unit roster with ARTS abilities, passives, statuses, summons, weather, terrain, skins, and progression. Play the 22-mission campaign, local hot-seat 2-4 player matches, single-player vs CPU, Tempo Battle vs CPU, or online Quick Match/private rooms with Classic 1v1, Draft 1v1, 4 Player FFA, and 2v2 Teams.
status: Release candidate — campaign, tutorials, local/CPU play, Online Versus, Tempo Battle, Valor progression, skins, and shop
